ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-26-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
This cause came on for Default Prove Up
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR: Sara Lerschen.
Appearances:
Debra D. Lew, Esq. For Plaintiff State Bar of California, the General Counsel for State Bar, Tracey McCormick, also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff: State Bar of California and against the defendant: Sandra d. Hardridge
as follows:
Principal of $69,860.00
Attorney's fees of $0.00
Costs of $0.00
Interest of $0.00
For the total of $69,860.00

Judgment signed in open court.
